message:
fix(vendored): fix 4 bugs in pty, client, and window crates

- pty/win/mod.rs: fix inverted TerminateProcess return value check —
  WinAPI returns non-zero on success, code was returning Err on success
  and Ok on failure. Affects both WinChild::do_kill and WinChildKiller::kill.

- pty/win/conpty.rs: clamp ConPTY dimensions to i16::MAX before cast —
  prevents silent negative wrapping when terminal cols/rows exceed 32767.
  Applied to both initial creation and resize paths.

- client/client.rs: replace unwrap() on take_stream() with proper anyhow
  error — prevents panic when mux connection stream is not established.

- window/spawn.rs: add null check after CFRunLoopObserverCreate on macOS —
  prevents undefined behavior if observer creation fails.

Validated: pty and client crates compile clean via rch. Window crate
changes are macOS-specific and verified syntactically correct.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
